title: Claim
description: A statement derived from one or more Evidence Objects, carrying a research state and a full transparency record. First draft, not yet reviewed by Kemi.

supporting_evidence_ids.description: IDs of schemas/evidence-object.schema.json records. Required (min 1) before research_state may be anything other than unverified or unknown, per governance/constitutional-rules.md IE-001.

minority_hypothesis_ids.description: Claims that remain unproven but should not be discarded (Minority Hypotheses reasoning layer).

reasoning_step_ids.description: IDs of schemas/reasoning-step.schema.json records applied to this claim.

assumptions.description: What is taken as given without direct evidentiary support. Required by docs/transparency-rules.md.

inferences.description: What follows from evidence via reasoning, distinct from assumptions.
